steps.title: Contrast realism and romance
steps.content: The passage contrasts realism, which aimed to portray average working people accurately, with romantic painting. The romantic style is described as hiding imperfection while presenting subjects' beauty or heroism in an elevated way, so the missing word must mean heighten or overstate.

steps.title: Choose the heightening verb
steps.content: Exaggerate fits because it means to represent something as greater or more extreme than it is. B means fix, C means weaken, and D means ridicule; none matches making beauty or heroism seem greater while concealing flaws. The answer is A.
